abp_assumptions.A9: ESG compliance maintained — no material regulatory breach or carbon penalty affecting hotel valuations

hedging_actions: Maintain ESG compliance tracker updated quarterly with all jurisdictional deadlines
Pre-approve capex budget for energy efficiency upgrades flagged as AT RISK
Annual ETI/SA8000 audit programme — all managed and franchise properties

indicators.name: ESG regulatory deadline compliance
indicators.description: Count of ESG regulations with AT RISK compliance status across portfolio
indicators.recommendation: 3 regulations AT RISK — EUR 230k penalty exposure; immediate compliance programme required.

indicators.name: AT RISK: UK MEES Regulation Upgrade (EPC Band C)
indicators.description: Commercial properties must achieve EPC Band C — 2 UK properties currently Band D
indicators.recommendation: Jurisdiction: United Kingdom | Deadline: 2027-04-01 | Energy performance certificate

indicators.name: AT RISK: French Decree Tertiaire — 40% Energy Reduction
indicators.description: Commercial buildings must cut energy use 40% vs 2010 baseline — FR portfolio on track for 28% only
indicators.recommendation: Jurisdiction: France | Deadline: 2030-01-01 | Energy reduction target

indicators.name: AT RISK: UAE Hotel Sustainability Framework — Dubai Green A
indicators.description: Hotels must hold LEED or Green Key certification — RAD031 and RAD032 not yet certified
indicators.recommendation: Jurisdiction: United Arab Emirates | Deadline: 2026-06-30 | Energy efficiency certification

indicators.name: Portfolio energy intensity gaps
indicators.description: Properties materially above kWh/room-night intensity target
indicators.recommendation: 12/32 properties >30% above energy target — EUR 5485k capex required; carbon penalty risk escalating.

indicators.name: Worst energy gap — RAD025
indicators.description: Property furthest above energy intensity target
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Blu Amsterdam Airport (Netherlands): 93.1 kWh/RN vs target 58.0 — capex EUR 780k

indicators.name: Carbon reduction trajectory vs 2030 target
indicators.description: Scope 1 + 2 emissions progress against 2030 reduction commitments
indicators.recommendation: 6/8 Scope 1+2 pathways off-track for 2030 — SBTi commitment at risk; CSRD reporting exposure.

indicators.name: Labour standards audit findings
indicators.description: ETI/SA8000 audit results and labour rights compliance across portfolio
indicators.recommendation: 1 critical finding(s) + 2 high modern-slavery-risk properties — immediate remediation and legal review.

indicators.name: Critical labour finding — RAD022
indicators.description: Critical audit finding requiring immediate remediation
indicators.recommendation: RAD022 (Italy): CRITICAL FINDING | Living wage: NO | Modern slavery: HIGH
